science.label: The Science
science.title:
Jyotish is not belief.

It is observation.
science.intro: For over 5,000 years, Vedic astronomers mapped the precise positions of planets and correlated them with human experience. These positions are mathematically verifiable — the same astronomy that powers modern orbital mechanics.

planets.title: Planetary positions are mathematical
planets.body: At the moment of your birth, every planet occupies a precise degree in the sky — calculable to the arcsecond. This is astronomy, not opinion.

snapshot.title: The chart is a cosmic snapshot
snapshot.body: Your kundali is a map of where every planet was, relative to your birthplace, at the exact moment you arrived. Two people born minutes apart in different cities have meaningfully different charts.

framework.title: Interpretation follows a framework
framework.body: Each planet governs domains of life. Each rashi modifies expression. Each house represents a life area. Reading a chart applies a consistent, structured framework — not guesswork.

dasha.title: Dasha periods are time-coded
dasha.body: The Vimshottari dasha system divides your life into planetary periods calculated from your Moon's nakshatra at birth. Every person's sequence is unique — and mathematically precise.

comparison.label: Why Taaraa
comparison.title:
The problem with

inconsistent readings.
comparison.intro: A good astrologer knows Jyotish deeply. But human readers get tired, rushed, or inconsistent — the same chart read on different days can sound different. That is not Jyotish failing. That is inconsistency failing you.

language.taaraa: English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Telugu & Tamil

process.label: Process
process.title:
Three steps to

your reading.
process.intro: No account needed. No waiting. Just your birth details — and we handle the rest.

birth.title: Enter your birth details
birth.body: Date, time, and place of birth. The more accurate your birth time, the more precise your lagna and house placements will be.

calculate.title: We calculate your chart
calculate.body: Using precise sidereal astronomy with the Lahiri ayanamsa, we compute your exact planetary positions in the Vedic system.

read.title: Read your interpretation
read.body: Classical Jyotish principles are applied to your exact chart. You receive a personalised reading in plain language — in the language you choose.

readings.label: What You Get
readings.title:
What your

kundali reveals.
readings.intro: Three focused readings, each grounded in your exact chart positions — not your sun sign, not a generic weekly forecast.

personality.title: Personality
personality.body: How you show up in the world, your inner emotional life, and your strongest natural gifts — described in everyday language, not astrological jargon.

career.title: Career & Dharma
career.body: Career paths that suit your nature, your working style and strengths, and practical advice for your professional life — from your 10th house and its lord.

dasha.title: Current Dasha
dasha.body: Which planetary period governs your life right now, what themes it activates in your chart, and what the next 12–18 months may hold.

one.quote: The chart was more accurate than others I had seen. Reading it in Telugu made everything easy to understand.
one.name: Lakshmi P. · Hyderabad

two.quote: The personality reading described me more accurately than two astrologers I had paid ₹2,000 each. No upselling, no fear tactics.
two.name: Ravi K. · Vijayawada

three.quote: The dasha reading was spot on for what's happening in my life this year. Practical and clear — not vague predictions.

chart.label: Your chart
chart.title:
Enter your details.

Read your stars.
chart.intro: Generate your Lahiri sidereal chart and choose a reading — personality, career, or current life phase.
chart.placeholder: Fill in your birth details and tap Generate Chart

cta.label: Begin
cta.title:
Your chart has been written.

Read it.
cta.body: The planets do not change their positions based on who is reading your chart. We simply make sure nothing is lost between the cosmos and you.
cta.note: Daily free readings · No credit card needed

footer.tagline: Vedic astrology, calculated precisely · Six Indian languages
footer.disclaimer: Taaraa uses precise sidereal calculations and structured Jyotish interpretation. We do not offer remedies, gemstone recommendations, or religious services. Readings are for self-reflection and guidance only.
